cvbyte.info: Range 0-127 - (Range 1-255 for Motorola) Default 3
Start voltage Sets the minimum speed of the engine Range 1 - 64 Default 3
This value multiplied by 0.25 is the time from stop to maximum speed Range 0 - 255 Default 16
This value multiplied by 0.25 is the time from stop to maximum speed Range 0 - 255 Default 12
Maximum speed of the engine Range 0 - 64 Default 64
Medium speed of the engine. 0 - 64 Default 22
Version number Internal software version of decoder
ID ESU - Read Default 151
WARNING Writing value 8 in this CV will trigger a reset to factory default values
Long address of engine Range Bitwise 11000000 to 11100111 Default 11000000 (192)
Long address of engine Range Bitwise 00000000 to 11111111 (0 - 255) Default 10000000 (128)

Additional address for consist operation. Value 0 or 128 means: consist address is disabled. Active consist address Range for Forward 1 - 127. Active consist address Range for Reverse 129 - 255. Default 0

dipvalue.name: Brake on DC, if polarity against driving direction
Brake on DC, if polarity like driving direction
RailCom Plus automatic loco recognition active

cvbyte.info: Index Register H Selection page for CV257-512. Undocumented Default=1
Index Register L Selection page for CV257-512. Undocumented Default=0
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=1
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=2
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=4
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=8
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=64
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=128
AUX3 LokPilot Fx Nano only. See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=16
AUX4 LokPilot Fx Nano only. See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=32
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=0
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=0
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=0
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=0
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=0
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=0
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=4
Back EMF Configuration. Default 16

dipvalue.name: Enable automatic DCC speed step detection

cvbyte.info: Defines the Back EMF voltage, which the motor should generate at maximum speed. If the engine does not reach maximum speed, reduce this parameter. Range 0-255 Default=140
K–component of the internal PI-controller. Defines the effect of load control. The higher the value, the stronger the effect of Back EMF control. Range 0 - 255 Default=50

I–component of the internal PI-controller. Defines the momentum (inertia) of the motor. The higher the momentum of the motor (large flywheel or bigger motor), the lower this value has to be set. Range 0 - 255 Default=100
Flashing frequency for Strobe lighting effects.Multiple of 0.065536 seconds. Range 0 - 255 Default=16
Defines brightness and mode of output Head light. Range 0 - 255 Default=15
Defines brightness and mode of output Rear light Range 0 - 255 Default=15
Defines brightness and mode of output AUX1 Range 50 - 200 Default=15
Defines brightness and mode of output AUX2 Range 10 - 20 Default=15
Defines brightness and mode of output AUX3 Not Available on this decoder. Range 0 - 255 Default=15
Defines brightness and mode of output AUX4 Not Available on this decoder. Range 0 - 255 Default=15
Defines the start delay when function is active. A multiple of 0.065536 seconds. Range 0 - 255 Default=0
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=0
See Lokpilot Nano Instruction Manual Fig. 5 Default=0
